The facebook content script needs to load the the marketplace page and click the 'home for sale or rent' button when we create a draft

here is a sample fb marketplace draft listing page that we need to form fill: 'apps/plugin/docs/fb-marketplace-create-rental.html' Here is the the begining element for the fb form to create the draft : <div aria-label="Marketplace" role="form">

/plan "the plugin app has a facebook-marketplace content script. When it detects that it is on the create a new real estate listing page '/marketplace/create/rental' it needs to let the page load, then identify the form, then identify the form controls we need to to enter our data into. Here is an image of the rendered page. We want the page to output a message if it is able to identify the form and the controls and which ones it found. We can use both a javascript alert and also log a message that we can see in the browser log. Here is a image of the facebook page"
